title: SEC Chair: BTC and ETH Have Been Clearly Defined as Non-Securities
message_html: SEC Chair: BTC and ETH Have Been Clearly Defined as Non-Securities ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): SEC Chair: BTC and ETH Have Been Clearly Defined as Non-Securities On March 18 at the DC Blockchain Summit 2026, SEC Chair Paul Atkins announced a new token taxonomy and investment contract interpretation framework, ending long-standing regulatory uncertainty.
